data.name: Neko Doll
data.detailed_description:
介紹

歡迎來到貓娘的神秘空間，你的貓娘正等著你和她一起攻克難關，破除封印，然後獲得與她親密接觸的機會。 遊戲關卡充滿挑戰性，完成關卡就可以解鎖不同的場景，動作，以及多套服裝。 進入不同的場景與你的貓娘一起開心互動，快樂正在前方等著你！

遊戲帶有提示功能，如果覺得關卡有難度也可以點擊提示按鈕，快速通關。

特色

  • 精美可愛的3D貓娘
  • 多部位可觸摸的物理效果
  • 具有挑戰性的關卡
  • 可解鎖的3D場景，動作，服裝
  • 放鬆減壓
data.about_the_game:
介紹

歡迎來到貓娘的神秘空間，你的貓娘正等著你和她一起攻克難關，破除封印，然後獲得與她親密接觸的機會。 遊戲關卡充滿挑戰性，完成關卡就可以解鎖不同的場景，動作，以及多套服裝。 進入不同的場景與你的貓娘一起開心互動，快樂正在前方等著你！

遊戲帶有提示功能，如果覺得關卡有難度也可以點擊提示按鈕，快速通關。

特色

  • 精美可愛的3D貓娘
  • 多部位可觸摸的物理效果
  • 具有挑戰性的關卡
  • 可解鎖的3D場景，動作，服裝
  • 放鬆減壓
data.short_description: 快來遇見你的貓娘玩偶，讓她陪你一起完成充滿挑戰的關卡，解鎖她的神秘空間，在不同的場景中體驗與貓娘親密接觸的快樂。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Core i3+
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c+
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any

data.name: Neko Doll
data.detailed_description:
Introduction

Welcome to the mysterious realm of neko, your neko is waiting for you to overcome difficulties with her, break the seal, and get the chance to get close to her. The game levels are full of challenges, and you can unlock different scenes, actions, and multiple costumes by completing the levels. Enter different scenes to meet your neko, and happiness is waiting for you in the front!

The game has a prompt function, if you think the level is difficult, you can click the prompt button to quickly pass the level.

features

  • Beautiful and lovely 3D neko
  • challenging levels
  • Unlockable 3D scenes, costumes
  • Relax and reduce stress
data.about_the_game:
Introduction

Welcome to the mysterious realm of neko, your neko is waiting for you to overcome difficulties with her, break the seal, and get the chance to get close to her. The game levels are full of challenges, and you can unlock different scenes, actions, and multiple costumes by completing the levels. Enter different scenes to meet your neko, and happiness is waiting for you in the front!

The game has a prompt function, if you think the level is difficult, you can click the prompt button to quickly pass the level.

features

  • challenging levels
  • Unlockable 3D scenes, costumes

data.short_description: Come and meet your neko doll, let her accompany you to complete challenging levels, unlock her mysterious realm, and experience the joy of intimate contact with neko in different scenes.
data.supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Core i3+
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c+
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: any
